calendar.matters:
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Denied

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Karen Uchiyame, Esq. for Plaintiff: 621 Taylor LP,
Plaintiff's Witness Kelly Stone was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Randall Hoffman.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 621 Taylor Street #36, San Francisco, CA 94109.
The lease is forfeited.
Back rent & Holdover Damages - $2,652.00
Costs - Per memo of costs.
Total - $2,652.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)

Karen Uchiyama, Attorney at Law, appeared for plaintiff 621 Taylor, LP. A settlement conference was not held, because the defendant did not appear.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 remains on calendar.
